instructions.summary: Connect the VerdeDesk repo to Vercel and deploy the landing page
instructions.detail: The MVP landing page with waitlist capture is scaffolded and ready. It needs to be deployed to Vercel so we can start collecting signups. The repo is at https://github.com/carloshmiranda/verdedesk. Deploy from the /MVP subfolder (set Root Directory to MVP in Vercel settings).
instructions.exact_action:
1. Go to vercel.com/new → Import Git Repository → select 'verdedesk'
2. Set Root Directory to: MVP
3. Framework preset: Vite
4. Add environment variable: DATABASE_URL (get from Neon — create a free project at neon.tech if not yet done)
5. Click Deploy
6. After deploy succeeds, copy the deployment URL and reply here or send it as an iMessage
instructions.unblocks: Waitlist signups collection — the validation sprint cannot start until the page is live
